# terrible_community_general_keycloak_userprofile (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `parent_id` (String) The parent ID of the realm key. In practice the ID (name) of the realm.

### Optional

- `config` (String) The configuration of the User Profile Provider.
- `provider_id` (String) The name of the provider ID for the key (supported value is `declarative-user-profile`).
- `provider_type` (String) Component type for User Profile (only supported value is `org.keycloak.userprofile.UserProfileProvider`).
- `state` (String) State of the User Profile provider. On `present`, the User Profile provider is created if it does not yet exist, or updated with the parameters you provide. On `absent`, the User Profile provider is removed if it exists.

### Read-Only

- `data` (String) The data returned by the Keycloak API.
- `msg` (String) The output message generated by the module.
